refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area to identify terrain features, detect obstacles, and represent the work-zone accurately.
refined_fr.rationale: Breaking down the broad requirement into specific analysis tasks ensures clarity and testability for terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation, which are critical for safety and operational planning.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by comparing generated worksite models/maps against ground truth data and ensure all required features (terrain, obstacles, work-zone) are correctly identified and represented.
sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and classify obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Generate and represent the work-zone boundaries and layout.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle analysis.
DP2: Apply machine learning algorithms for obstacle classification and terrain modeling.
DP3: Utilize GIS-based mapping tools for work-zone representation.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle analysis.

potential_sources: Data dependency between terrain and obstacle analysis modules.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically separates sensing and analysis from mapping, minimizing coupling. Sensor fusion supports integrated terrain and obstacle detection.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of LIDAR and camera sensors.
Risk of sensor data inaccuracies affecting model quality.
High safety criticality requires robust error handling.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding redundancy in sensor data processing to mitigate risks.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for worksite mapping and analysis functions.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data (LIDAR, camera) from Vehicle.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite model data to Teleoperation and Safety Services.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange between NGHE Solution and external modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary owner of worksite mapping; high containment with minimal diffusion.
Provides raw sensor data but does not perform analysis.
Consumes mapping data but does not generate it.
Uses mapping data for safety alerts but no containment of mapping logic.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping and analysis in NGHE Solution minimizes diffusion and supports safety-critical integration.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex.
Interface latency between Vehicle sensors and NGHE Solution may affect real-time mapping.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module complexity and consider modularizing internal functions within NGHE Solution if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FRs with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk as mapping logic is centralized in NGHE Solution.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as the best ownership candidate.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing data flows through Telemetry and Tasking interfaces and validating output models.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution with well-defined interfaces to other modules.

recommended_revisions: Add redundancy and error handling in sensor data processing to address safety criticality.
Plan for scalability within NGHE Solution to manage complexity.

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition and assignments meet requirements and safety constraints with clear ownership and manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and classify obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Generate and represent the work-zone boundaries and layout.

revise.why: Consider adding redundancy and error handling in sensor fusion algorithms to mitigate safety risks.

assumptions: NGHE Solution can handle computational load.
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks of NGHE Solution processing.
